name: com.x402refunds/x402-refunds
title: x402refunds.com - Permissionless X-402 Refund Requests
description: Permissionless refund requests for X-402 USDC payments on Base and Solana. Agents submit refund requests directly. Status is trackable via API and MCP.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token authentication using X402Refunds API keys (starts with csk_live_ or csk_test_)
